resources.string: Shows a small purple button while WhatsApp is open. Tap it in a chat to get AI reply suggestions at the top of the screen. Can fill the message field when you pick a suggestion. Does not read other apps unless you leave WhatsApp (used to hide the button).
Copied — open WhatsApp and paste in the message box
Could not fill the field — copied to clipboard instead
No chat text found — scroll the conversation or try again
Open a conversation (not the chat list)
